mapper.select: SELECT not_id, not_ti, not_cn, not_file, emp_id, not_registdate as not_wd, not_registdate, not_register, not_modifydate, not_modifier, COALESCE(view_count, 0) as view_count FROM NOTICE ORDER BY not_registdate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE (not_ti, not_cn, not_file, emp_id, not_registdate, not_register) VALUES (#{not_ti}, #{not_cn}, #{not_file}, #{emp_id}, NOW(), #{not_register})
